pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which hardcode this directory path.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh which places the bugs in this file and verifier.py which evaluates fixes made in this file.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh tests and execution of pytest, which collected and executed 13 tests, not 12.
Code analysis of verifier.py which requires the score to be >= 70 to pass.

privileged_info_summary: The project directory is confirmed to be /home/ga/PycharmProjects/security_linter and the target file containing the logic bugs is linter/visitors.py. A review of the tests generated in setup_task.sh and direct execution via pytest confirms there are 13 total tests in the suite, contradicting the claim of 12 tests. The passing threshold for the verifier score is confirmed to be 70.
